title: tragacantha arida
intro: Tragacantha arida, also known as the broom grass or broom sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is commonly found in dry areas and has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Tragacantha arida include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its dried leaves and stems in hot water, or as a tincture by extracting its active compounds with a solvent.
